creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jkois Date: Mon Mar 3 16:44:01 2014 New Revision: 44110 URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/44110 Log: PR: www/159291 As remko@ assign this to me: Implement a quick-and-dirty solution to fix a broken link on the Spanish version of the website and link to the Spanish send-pr.html. The Spanish version of the website has not seen an update since 2010 therefore most changes since then are either not available or are broken. The send-pr web form is still working though. Tested with PR www/187222. Modified: head/es_ES.ISO8859-1/htdocs/index.xsl Modified: head/es_ES.ISO8859-1/htdocs/index.xsl ============================================================================== --- head/es_ES.ISO8859-1/htdocs/index.xsl Mon Mar 3 16:16:57 2014 (r44109) +++ head/es_ES.ISO8859-1/htdocs/index.xsl Mon Mar 3 16:44:01 2014 (r44110) @@ -150,7 +150,7 @@ Listas de distribución
  • - Reporte un Fallo + Reporte un Fallo
  • FAQ
